text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I finish work after classes are over.<n>As I'm
heading home, I hear someone<n>singing from
somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, to stage left! ♪ Four,<n>five, six, to
stage right! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I turn in the direction of the voice and<n>find that the
lights in the dance studio<n>are still on.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I think I'm getting there! Gonna<n>take it from
the top! Let's go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry to intrude.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Oguri! Are you here to practice<n>too?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Uh, no, I'm supposed to lock up,<n>actually...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What?! Is it seriously that late<n>already?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But... but there's still stuff I want to<n>work on!
There's not long left till I'll<n>have to perform for
real!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Please, please, please! Can you wait<n>just a
teensy bit longer?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... Fine. But only a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And now I do a... perfect turn! ♪ Ooh,<n>yeah, that's
good! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Oguri? Like my<n>performance?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I think I've heard this song<n>before...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's not what I asked!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah... I do know this song. Idanced to it in my hometown a longtime ago.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! You're from the countryside,<n>aren't
you, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My next race is in the countryside,<n>actually.
That's what I'm practicing<n>for!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone learns the central songs in<n>school, but
you've gotta learn the<n>regional ones yourself!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see... You're really passionate,<n>Falco.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Even when I used to run in the<n>countryside, there
weren't many<n>runners who took the winning
concert<n>that seriously.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I bet. But I'm an Umadol, after<n>all!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I do it for everyone who's always<n>supported me
and for those who are<n>going to be my new fans!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I always give them the best<n>performance I can!
And always with a<n>big smile! ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're amazing... I think I could learn<n>a lot from
your passion.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Then why not try to become<n>an Umadol
too? ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Umadol or not, this'll be a good<n>chance to
improve my stage presence.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: However, it really is time to close up<n>the studio.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umm, do you think it'd be possible to<n>stay just a
liiittle longer, huh? ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I dunno. The teacher'll get mad if I<n>don't lock up.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about that! Please, the<n>race is
almost here! I just need a<n>teeny bit longer!
